qa_pairs.question: dolo 650 available
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Dolo 650 Tablet is available for PKR 35 (400 units in stock). It's used to relieve fever and pain.

qa_pairs.question: augmentin available
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Augmentin 625 Duo is available for PKR 150 (80 units in stock). It is used for bacterial infections.

qa_pairs.question: crocin available
qa_pairs.answer: Crocin Advance Tablet is currently out of stock. It is used for pain and fever relief.

qa_pairs.question: diabetes medicines
qa_pairs.answer: We have Metformin HCL 500mg available for PKR 180 (150 units). It is used for type 2 diabetes.

qa_pairs.question: ors price
qa_pairs.answer: ORS Sachet is available for PKR 10 (2500 units in stock) for oral rehydration.

qa_pairs.question: eye drops
qa_pairs.answer: 2blink Eye Drop 15ml is currently out of stock. It helps with dry eyes.

qa_pairs.question: allergy medicine
qa_pairs.answer: Cetrizine Tablet is available for PKR 20 (300 units). It helps with allergy symptoms.
